title: [MTR4] Low Effort Eidan 8000
description: Low Effort Tokyo Metro 'Eidan' 8000 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort Eidan 8000
![Banner image for LERT Eidan 8000, featuring the 2 window variants available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9b00996230c358f78546e19c432467dd3c77d39.png)
This resource pack adds the Tokyo Metro 8000 series (Eidan 8000) for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the Eidan 9000 from the base MTR mod.
## Variants
- Big windows
  - Long
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
  - Normal
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
  - Mini
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
- Small windows
  - Long
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
  - Normal
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
  - Mini
    - Chopper Control motor
    - VVVF motor
